bench_set.description: Curated 52-task subset where fiz-openrouter-qwen3-6-27b has been observed to pass at least one rep. Focus local-Qwen experiments on tasks the cloud baseline can solve.

versioning.snapshot: deepseek-v4-flash via ds4-server antirez/ds4@ae302c2f | gguf=DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2.gguf | hw=apple-m2-ultra-192gb | backend=metal | kv_disk=/Volumes/Samsung/ds4-kv@131072MB | ctx=393216

bragi-club-3090.description: vLLM with autoround quantization on bragi RTX 3090 (http://bragi:8020/v1). Single-cell serialization.

grendel-rapid-mlx.description: Rapid-MLX server on grendel (http://grendel:8000/v1). Single-cell serialization.

openai-gpt55.description: Native OpenAI GPT-5.5 lane (https://api.openai.com/v1). RPM 500, TPM 500000. Per-run cap $8; per-phase cap $300.

openrouter.description: Managed OpenRouter lane (https://openrouter.ai/api/v1). RPM 500, TPM 200000. Per-run cap $5; per-phase cap $50; per-sweep cap $150.

openrouter-qwen36-27b.description: Managed OpenRouter Qwen3.6-27B lane. Separated from openrouter so full Qwen runs do not share a limiter with Claude/GPT harness comparison lanes. RPM 500, TPM 1000000.

sindri-club-3090.description: vLLM with autoround quantization on sindri RTX 3090 (http://sindri:8020/v1). Mutually exclusive with sindri-club-3090-llamacpp (same machine + port).

sindri-club-3090-llamacpp.description: llama.cpp's llama-server on sindri (http://sindri:8020/v1) hosting Unsloth Qwen3.6-27B-UD-Q3_K_XL GGUF. Mutually exclusive with sindri-club-3090.

sindri-lucebox-dflash.description: lucebox-hub DFlash speculative decoder on sindri (http://sindri:8080/v1, alias luce-dflash). Single-cell serialization.

vidar-ds4.description: DwarfStar 4 (antirez/ds4) on vidar (http://192.168.2.106:1236/v1). Single graph worker — strictly serialized. Mutually exclusive with vidar-omlx on the same hardware.

vidar-omlx.description: oMLX server on vidar (http://vidar:1235/v1). Single-model server; serialize all cells.
